text_positiv: Real responsibility, flexible schedule, helpful team
text_negativ: System access and onboarding could be prepared faster
text_freitext: A very good place to gain practical experience alongside university. I was included in relevant tasks and received regular feedback from experienced colleagues.

titel: Good work-life balance, unclear career paths
text_positiv: Flexible work, competitive benefits, secure employment
text_negativ: Promotion criteria and internal career paths are not always transparent
text_freitext: The working conditions are attractive and the team atmosphere is positive. More transparency around job levels and development opportunities would make the company even stronger.

titel: Supportive customer service team under high workload
text_positiv: Strong team spirit, structured training, reliable processes
text_negativ: Workload increases significantly during peak periods
text_freitext: The local team supports each other and the onboarding is well organized. Busy periods can be demanding, and staffing should be adjusted more closely to expected demand.

titel: Professional environment with too many meetings
text_positiv: Relevant projects, competent colleagues, good employment conditions
text_negativ: Too many recurring meetings and slow decisions
text_freitext: The projects are meaningful and involve many experienced specialists. However, a large amount of time is spent in coordination meetings without clear decisions or ownership.

titel: Challenging role with excellent learning opportunities
text_positiv: Complex topics, strong professional standards, good training options
text_negativ: Knowledge is sometimes concentrated among a few specialists
text_freitext: The risk management environment is demanding but offers a steep learning curve. Better documentation and knowledge sharing would make onboarding into specialist topics easier.

text_positiv: Flexible hours, mobile work, respectful cooperation
text_negativ: Part-time leadership models are not common in every department
text_freitext: The company offers very good flexibility and understanding for family responsibilities. The culture is respectful, though more senior part-time opportunities would be welcome.

titel: Innovative product work slowed by corporate processes
text_positiv: Interesting products, international collaboration, room for ideas
text_negativ: Approval processes can delay pilots and product decisions
text_freitext: Product management offers varied tasks and a broad view of the financial services business. Good ideas sometimes lose momentum because several departments need to approve them.

titel: Secure job, but leadership quality varies
text_positiv: Secure employment, fair benefits, helpful colleagues
text_negativ: Management style depends strongly on the individual department
text_freitext: The company provides stability and solid working conditions. My experience with direct leadership was mixed, and more consistent management standards would improve the workplace.
